Capsule Collection · Summer Twenty-Six

Of the Sea

A considered edit of swimwear designed on the shores of St Tropez and crafted with care in the United Kingdom.

Discover the Collection

Our Promise

Quietly considered, endlessly worn.

I

Made in the UK

Every Tidal piece is crafted in a small family-run atelier outside London — the same hands, the same care, every time.

II

Ethical & Recycled

We use premium recycled Italian Lycra and partner only with suppliers whose ethics match our own.

III

Built to Last

Double-lined, chlorine-resistant, and tested in the Mediterranean sun. Pieces meant for many summers, not one.
